message:
fix(connectors): use min/max message timestamps for session bounds and fall back ended_at to started_at

Two connector improvements for more robust session time bounds:

1. OpenCode connector (src/connectors/opencode.rs):
   - Replaced first()/last() message timestamp fallback with explicit
     min/max scan over all message created_at values, which is correct
     regardless of message ordering (messages may not be sorted by time)
   - Added .or(started_at) fallback chain for ended_at so that sessions
     with a created time but no updated time and no message timestamps
     still get a non-None ended_at (previously could return started_at
     with ended_at=None which is semantically inconsistent)
   - Added two edge-case tests:
     * edge_session_ended_at_uses_latest_available_message_timestamp:
       mixed timestamped/untimestamped messages derive bounds from
       the timestamped ones only
     * edge_session_ended_at_falls_back_to_started_at_when_updated_missing:
       session with only created time and no message timestamps gets
       ended_at = started_at

2. Cursor connector (src/connectors/cursor.rs):
   - Minor formatting: split tab_ts chain across lines for readability

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
